meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Your Freelance Dev Workflow: Project Management Guide
content.seo_description: Stop hitting the scaling wall. Master project management for developers using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality work faster than ever.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance business, you must transition from manual coding to system-driven project management. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous execution, you eliminate bottlenecks, automate repetitive boilerplate, and focus your billable hours on high-value logic instead of administrative overhead.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'Freelancer’s Paradox': you have more work than you can handle, yet you can’t scale because you are the bottleneck. Every hour spent manually wiring up boilerplate or managing project state is an hour stolen from your margins and your life. The weight of unfinished tasks looms over every weekend, and your growth is capped by the number of hours you can physically sit at a desk.

It doesn't have to be this way. The secret to scaling isn't working harder; it's building a 'force multiplier' environment. By leveraging the orchestration power of Antigravity and the autonomous coding capabilities of Claude Code, you can transform your dev process from a manual grind into a high-velocity, repeatable engine that handles the heavy lifting while you focus on the architecture that commands premium rates.

steps.title: Define the Project Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use Antigravity to structure your project requirements and tech stack. This ensures consistency across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project scaffold for a standard SaaS application including user auth, PostgreSQL integration, and a modular folder structure.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing repetitive auth and database connection code. Use AI to generate standardized modules that fit your architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure user authentication module using JWT and FastAPI, adhering to the folder structure defined in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate auth module with middleware"

steps.title: Implement Intelligent State Management
steps.description: Centralize your business logic to avoid spaghetti code. This makes scaling and refactoring significantly faster as projects grow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a state management pattern that separates UI concerns from business logic for a React/FastAPI stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement state machine for project tasks"

steps.title: Execute Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Scale with confidence by ensuring your code is battle-tested. Use Claude Code to write tests for every new feature generated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive unit tests for the authentication module generated in step 2, ensuring 90% coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create unit tests for auth module"

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy via CI/CD
steps.description: Automate the transition from local development to production. Define a script that handles build, test, and deploy cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys to Vercel/AWS upon pushing to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate github actions deployment pipeline"

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Library of Prompts' in Antigravity to ensure your coding style remains identical across different client projects.
Use Claude Code's --watch flag during development to automatically refactor code as you add dependencies.
Treat your project documentation as code—use AI to generate READMEs that update automatically when your logic changes.
Limit AI context windows by modularizing your app; smaller files lead to better output accuracy and less 'hallucinated' code.
Audit your AI output periodically; use the AI to perform 'code reviews' on its own work to catch architectural drift.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is automated, start building a library of reusable 'micro-services' within Antigravity that you can drag and drop into any future client project to reduce development time by 70%.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for money and start building a scalable engine that works for you. By mastering these tools, you aren't just a coder; you're an architect of your own success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
